_session_note: ecosystem_core built and validated. sim_test ported. Constants confirmed. Omnivore split logic implemented but dispatch bug still present — omnivore going through herbivore_fitness path instead of omnivore_fitness_at. Next session: fix dispatch, test omnivore dynamics.

overview.name: Ecosystem CCG
overview.status: active — ecosystem_core running. sim_test ported. Constants confirmed. Omnivore dispatch bug pending fix.
overview.workspace: ~/ecosystem/ — workspace root with members: core, game, sim_test, salsa_proto
overview.repo_note: Code lives in Claude outputs / Termux filesystem, not in this repo. KB tracks design only.

architecture.separation_rule: ui.rs is the ONLY file with stdin/stdout. All other modules are pure logic.

module_roles.types.rs: All data types, constants, trait system, card types, intention phase types. Zero I/O.
module_roles.cards.rs: All card definitions and deck builders. Zero I/O.
module_roles.biome.rs: DEPRECATED — monolithic fitness resolution replaced by ecosystem_core. Still present in game crate, not yet removed.
module_roles.player.rs: Three separate decks, two hands, discard/graveyard zones, elimination logic. Zero I/O.
module_roles.game.rs: Turn loop, human action API, win/loss conditions. No direct I/O.
module_roles.ui.rs: All terminal input/output. Replace with egui when porting to Android.

ecosystem_core.role: Standalone crate owning all fitness computation via salsa 0.26. sim_test depends on it. Game crate not yet ported.
ecosystem_core.pattern: OrganismInputs and BiomeInputs as salsa input structs. Trait modifiers are leaf fields with defaults. Fitness queries are tracked functions. Adding a trait = setting a leaf field. No formula changes required.
ecosystem_core.db_pattern: Db trait (#[salsa::db]) + EcosystemDb concrete struct. All query functions take &dyn Db. fitness_for takes &mut dyn Db for omnivore split setting.
ecosystem_core.setter_export: salsa::Setter re-exported as ecosystem_core::Setter for downstream crates.
ecosystem_core.last_population: OrganismInputs has last_population field. Set at start of each turn before fitness queries. food_pool uses last_population not population (Option B timing).
ecosystem_core.omnivore_carnivore_fraction: OrganismInputs has omnivore_carnivore_fraction field (f32, default 0.5). Set by fitness_for when role is Omnivore after trying all OMNI_SPLITS.

api_notes.db_trait: #[salsa::db] on both trait and impl. Concrete db takes salsa::Storage<Self>.
api_notes.tracked_functions: First arg must be &dyn Db not &ConcreteDb.
api_notes.setter: use ecosystem_core::Setter (re-exported) to call .to() on setters.
api_notes.update_derive: unsafe impl salsa::Update for Role — manual impl required in 0.26.

sim_harness.location: sim_test/ — standalone Rust binary, runs on Termux
sim_harness.config: sim.toml — edit organism and land stats without recompile
sim_harness.status: PORTED TO ecosystem_core. biome.rs and types.rs still present as dead files.
sim_harness.food_pool_timing: Option B active — last_population snapshot at turn start. food_pool = sum(last_pop * food_output_multiplier). No fitness scaling.
sim_harness.population_thresholds: Applied in sim_test/src/main.rs after fitness queries. Role-grouped for best/worst comparisons.

share_formula.water: water_share = (org_pop / total_animal_pop) * water — equal share per individual
share_formula.herbivore_food: food_share = (org_pop / total_herb_omni_pop) * food_pool — equal share per individual. Omnivore participates at fraction (1-c).
share_formula.carnivore_food: food_share = (org_pop / total_carn_pop) * prey_value — equal share per individual. Omnivore participates at fraction c.
share_formula.rationale: Pop-based not need-based. Each individual gets equal access; need determines sufficiency.

components.deficit_term: product((f - critical) / (1.0 - critical)) for all f < 1.0

fitness_system.critical_check: Any single factor below FITNESS_CRITICAL_NEED → returns FITNESS_AUTO_DOWNGRADE * 0.5
fitness_system.food_pool_timing: Uses last_population (Option B) — one-turn delay. No fitness scaling on output.

resources.sunlight: tolerance_factor(supply, sun_need, 999.0). Shading: available_light -= sum(territory * pop) * SHADE_K per size group.
resources.food_herbivore: Pop-based share of food_pool. resource_factor(share, food_need * pop).
resources.food_carnivore: Pop-based share of prey_value. resource_factor(share, food_need * pop).

pressure_system.food_pressure: (total_herb_omni_food_need / total_prod_pop) * PRESSURE_K1. Applied to producer fitness.
pressure_system.trampling: sum(max(0, herb_size - prod_size) * herb_territory * herb_pop) * prod_pop * PRESSURE_K2. Absolute scaling — product of herbivore and producer populations. Herbivore and omnivore only, carnivore excluded.
pressure_system.trampling_rationale: Physical encounter rate scales with both populations absolutely. Carnivore biomass too low to contribute.

predation_system.hunt_limit: size * hunt_multiplier + hunt_size_bonus — additive bonus. hunt_multiplier always 1.0 for base organisms (vestigial, to be removed).
predation_system.prey_value_herbivore: size * pop * HERBIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR (0.7). Omnivore as prey also uses this.
predation_system.competition: total_prey_value / total_carn_pop — per individual share. Omnivore participates at fraction c.
predation_system.predation_factor: 1 / (1 + carn_food_need / prey_share * PREDATION_K). Applied to herbivore and omnivore fitness.

omnivore_system.split_options: OMNI_SPLITS = [0.0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75] — carnivore fraction. 1.0 excluded (that is Role::Carnivore).
omnivore_system.food_blend: plant_food = (pop * herb_frac / total_herb_omni_pop) * food_pool. prey_food = (pop * c / total_carn_pop) * prey_value. total_food = plant_food + prey_food.
omnivore_system.aggregate_participation: total_herb_omni_pop: omnivore counted at (1-c). total_carn_pop: omnivore counted at c.
omnivore_system.prey_eligibility: Same size rules as carnivore. hunt_limit = size * hunt_multiplier + hunt_size_bonus. At size 1.7 with multiplier 1.0: hunts prey below 1.7, catches herbivore (1.5) but not carnivore (2.0).
omnivore_system.as_prey: Omnivore is prey for carnivores at HERBIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR regardless of current split.
omnivore_system.dispatch_bug: fitness_for currently dispatches omnivore to herbivore_fitness instead of omnivore_fitness_at. Bug pending fix next session.
omnivore_system.calibration_target: 50% split as reference. Tune food_need and water_need at 50/50.

constants.threshold_note: Stability window: DOWNGRADE_IF_WORST=0.85, UPGRADE_IF_BEST=0.92. Narrow gap prevents oscillation trap while allowing carnivore to hold population at low prey.

omnivore.note: hunt_multiplier to be removed from config — always 1.0 for base organisms. Dispatch bug pending fix.

without_carnivore.1_1: Collapse confirmed. Both extinct by turn 8-10.
without_carnivore.design_goal: No stable P+H — collapse is default. Carnivore or omnivore required for stability.

with_carnivore.2_2_1: Stable. P reaches 4-6, H stabilizes 2-3, C stabilizes 2-3.
with_carnivore.3_3_1: Stable. P reaches 5-6, H stabilizes 2-4, C stabilizes 2-3.
with_carnivore.4_4_1: Stable. Takes until turn 8 to settle. Same final state.
with_carnivore.carnivore_role: Keeps H below trampling threshold, allows P to grow toward max.

with_omnivore.status: PENDING — dispatch bug prevents omnivore split logic from firing.
with_omnivore.p_alone_boom_bust: Confirmed — P+O collapses same as P+H without carnivore.
with_omnivore.p_h_o: Not yet confirmed stable — blocked by dispatch bug.

card_ideas_noted.camouflage_trait: PredationResistance scaling with population density — uses sparsity-style mechanic
card_ideas_noted.carnivorous_plant: Producer role with predation-like mechanic — gains fitness from small animal presence.
card_ideas_noted.hunt_size_bonus: Additive in ecosystem_core. hunt_multiplier vestigial — remove from config next session.

2026-05-26.decision: Adopt salsa 0.26 as incremental computation backend for ecosystem_core
2026-05-26.rationale: Validated prototype confirms dirty-flagging isolates per-organism subgraphs; trait modifiers as input leaves require no formula changes

2026-05-29.decision: Trampling scales as absolute product (herb_pop * prod_pop), not ratio
2026-05-29.rationale: Physical encounter rate scales with both populations; ratio formula prevented P from growing under carnivore control

2026-05-29.decision: food_pool decoupled from producer fitness (Option B)
2026-05-29.rationale: Fitness-scaled food created tight feedback preventing boom-bust. Pop-based food gives cliff-edge collapse.
Allows carnivore to hold population at low prey without oscillation trap.

2026-05-29.decision: Omnivore uses adaptive split across OMNI_SPLITS [0.0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75] each turn
2026-05-29.rationale: Maximizes fitness given current food availability. Participates fractionally in both herb and carn pools.

implementation.attempted: salsa_proto — producer + herbivore + carnivore fitness graph
implementation.decided: Migrate fitness resolution into ecosystem_core crate using salsa 0.26.

implementation.attempted: ecosystem_core build + sim_test port + constant tuning + omnivore split implementation
implementation.outcome: ecosystem_core builds. sim_test ported and running. Constants confirmed against reference dynamics. Workspace restructured to ~/ecosystem/. Omnivore split logic written but dispatch bug prevents it firing — omnivore still routed to herbivore_fitness.
implementation.decided: Next: fix omnivore dispatch in queries.rs, test P+H+O dynamics, then clean up hunt_multiplier from config.

Test P+H+O dynamics — confirm omnivore stabilizes like carnivore

Test P+O alone boom-bust still works after dispatch fix
